queries.question: which filmmaker created the drama movie
queries.sql: SELECT Filmmaker FROM Movies JOIN MovieGenre ON Movies.id  = MovieGenre.MovieId JOIN Genres  ON Genres.id = MovieGenre.GenreId WHERE Type = 'Drama';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?filmmaker WHERE {
  ?movies a :Movie .
  ?moviegenre a :MovieGenre .
  ?moviegenre p:hasMovies ?movies .
  ?genres a :Genre .
  ?moviegenre p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?movies p:Filmmaker ?filmmaker .
  ?genres p:Type ?type_f .
  FILTER(STR(?type_f) = "Drama")
}

queries.question: Who is the author of the drama movie?
queries.sql: SELECT Screenwriter FROM Movies JOIN MovieGenre ON Movies.id  = MovieGenre.MovieId JOIN Genres  ON Genres.id = MovieGenre.GenreId WHERE Type = 'Drama';
